LAW_4.description: Interface imports implementation — interfaces/execution.py and interfaces/systems.py re-export types from execution_engine.py
LAW_4.reason: These are re-exports for backward compatibility (e.g., DependencyGraph, PlanNode). The interface protocol itself (IExecutionEngine) is clean. Re-exports must be removed in a future cleanup pass.

LAW_5.description: Adapter points outside allowed targets — governance_adapter.py uses core/contracts.py and core/api_compliance.py
LAW_5.reason: Legacy adapters wrapping pre-3.x modules. The DefaultContractValidator and DefaultComplianceValidator will be replaced when the official service interfaces (D8.1) are implemented with real contracts.

LAW_16_high_risk_nodes.description: Nodes with risk_score > 0.8 that have NOT been decomposed. Verified via emo-guard --diff-only on 2026-05-21.
LAW_16_high_risk_nodes.reason: These 7 modules exceed the 0.8 risk threshold. Most are central coordinators (graph.py, root.py, dag.py, execution_engine.py) where high coupling is structural — they sit at the center of the dependency graph. Phase 3.7 partially mitigated execution_engine.py via Core+Runtime extraction, but the CodeGraph risk model (coupling × complexity) still rates them high. Planned remediation in Phase 3.4/3.7 continues.

affected_files_active.mitigation_plan: Decompose into sub-graph managers in Phase 3.7 — CodeGraph domain model extraction to separate query/serialize/storage layers
DI container naturally has high coupling. Acceptable if DI enforcement gates remain in place. Consider modular composition in Phase D8.
Partially mitigated via Phase 3.7 (ExecutionCore + ExecutionRuntime extraction). Risk persists because central coordinator still routes between extracted layers. Continued decomposition in Phase 3.7.
Protocol interface gathering re-exports. Clean re-exports to move to models.dag. Component of Phase 3.4.

Behavior already extracted to dag_utils.py. Remaining risk from structural re-exports (PlanNode, DependencyGraph referenced everywhere). Acceptable as shared domain model. No decomposition planned — risk is inherent.
IsolationRuntime combines filesystem/network/process checks into a single coordinator. Decompose into per-resource isolation modules in Phase 3.7.
Dead params cleaned in Phase 3.3.3 but CodeGraph model still sees coupling from serialization API. Consider further thinning in Phase D8.

H3-GAP-001.description: No payload size enforcement in IContractValidator (10MB accepted)
H3-GAP-001.mitigation: Add MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE constant + early validation in adapter layer
H3-GAP-001.reason: IContractValidator.validate() has no MAX_PAYLOAD_SIZE check — 10MB payloads pass validation. LAW 12 requires input bounds. LAW 9 (OWASP) requires size limits. Phase C.1 to add constant + adapter-level guard.

H3-GAP-002.description: No unicode/RTL control char sanitization in contract validation
H3-GAP-002.mitigation: Integrate unicodedata sanitization strip in validation pipeline
H3-GAP-002.reason: IContractValidator accepts unicode control characters (RTL, zero-width) without sanitization. LAW 12 requires input sanitization. Phase C.1 to integrate unicodedata stripping into validation pipeline.

affected_files_active.mitigation_plan: Add unicodedata sanitization to validation pipeline
